name: mcphire
description: MCPHire — IT job search, salary data, and resume review for the Russian market

tools.name: salary_data
tools.description: Get salary ranges for 15 IT roles across 5 Russian cities, by experience level (Junior/Middle/Senior/Lead)

tools.name: resume_review
tools.description: AI-powered resume analysis with 15-criteria scoring: structure, experience, skills, formatting

tools.name: job_search
tools.description: Search 50+ IT job listings from top Russian companies (Yandex, Sber, Tinkoff, VK, Avito). Filter by city, skills, level, salary, format

tools.name: market_trends
tools.description: IT job market trends and analytics for the Russian market: demand, supply, salary dynamics
